question_text: Which statement best explains what happens when you rub a balloon on your hair?

options.label: A
options.text: Electrons are transferred from your hair to the balloon, making the balloon negatively charged

options.label: B
options.text: Protons move from the balloon to your hair

options.label: C
options.text: The balloon becomes positively charged and repels your hair

options.label: D
options.text: Heat energy creates the static charge

explanation: When materials rub together, electrons (negative charges) can be transferred from one material to another. Your hair loses electrons to the balloon, so the balloon becomes negatively charged.
